description.ko: 고요한 유기적 네트워크 내의 세포 교환과 흐르는 생체 발광을 거시적으로 탐구한 작품입니다.
description.en: A macroscopic study of cellular exchange and flowing bioluminescence within a serene organic network.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Osmotic Veil.' A macro perspective of a pulsating membrane network featuring #7FB069 emerald moss-walls and #2D5A3D forest-green vascular filaments. The structure is submerged in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid atmosphere. Flowing ribbons of #FFE66D golden bioluminescent sap migrate like viscous liquid silk through semi-permeable cellular walls. Focus on the rhythmic expansion and contraction of translucent capillary systems. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution, serene organic life.
